posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
• Description: New or experienced monday.com users will benefit from joining this webinar by learning about monday.com’s newest features which will improve their workflows. Ultimately saving time and improving productivity. Learn how monday.com’s newest innovative features will improve your workflows, including:
    ----Group By Anything
    ----AI-Powered Translation
    ---- Portfolio Management Solution
    ----And much more…

  • Speaker: Julia Bakhuis - Implementation consultant / Customer Success Manager

  • Register here: Explore monday.com's Latest Features
